Ronnie Lee Hill Photography specializes in candid, romantic, and real moments, capturing weddings, elopements, and family photography across the Gulf Islands, Vancouver, and Sunshine Coast. With a focus on emotional connection rather than posed shots, Ronnie creates authentic and heartfelt images that celebrate each couple's unique love story.
